home.title: Welcome to Agenda Manager
home.description: Use the top menu to manage teachers, subjects, courses and generate timetables.

help.title: Help
help.description: Read the official user guides in HTML, rendered directly from the Markdown source files.
help.empty: No help content is currently available.

timetable.confirm_recreate: The current timetables will be deleted and new ones will be generated. Do you wish to continue?

subject_groups.title: Subject Packs
subject_groups.name: Name
subject_groups.error_hours_mismatch: ERROR: All selected subjects must have the same weekly hours.
subject_groups.hours_locked_info: Weekly hours are locked because the subject belongs to a pack.
subject_groups.shared_hours_hint: Hours taught together. Remaining hours are standalone.
subject_groups.error_shared_hours_invalid: Shared hours must be between 1 and the minimum weekly hours of selected subjects.

config.title: Configuration
config.invalid_days_per_week: Days per week must be between 1 and 7
config.duplicate_days: Each day must be unique. Please select different days for each position.
config.backup_desc: Export all data (courses, subjects, teachers, timetable) to a JSON file, import from a previous file, or clear all application data.
config.confirm_clear:
Are you sure you want to clear ALL data?
This will remove:
- All courses
- All subjects
- All teachers
- All subject packs
- All timetables
- Configuration

This action CANNOT be undone.
config.restrictions_desc: Uncheck any restriction you want to disable when generating the timetable. All restrictions are enabled by default.

restrictions.SubjectWeeklyHours_desc: Ensures each subject gets its required weekly hours per group.
restrictions.TeacherOneClassAtATime: Teacher one class at a time
restrictions.TeacherOneClassAtATime_desc: A teacher cannot teach two classes in the same time slot.
restrictions.TeacherUnavailableTimes_desc: Prevents assigning teachers to hours they have marked as unavailable.
restrictions.TeacherMaxWeeklyHours_desc: Limits each teacher to their configured maximum weekly hours.
restrictions.GroupSubjectMaxHoursPerDay: Group subject max hours per day
restrictions.GroupSubjectMaxHoursPerDay_desc: Limits how many hours per day a subject can be taught to a group.
restrictions.GroupAtMostOneLogicalAssignment: Group at most one logical assignment
restrictions.GroupAtMostOneLogicalAssignment_desc: Ensures a group can only have one subject (or Subject Pack) per hour slot.
restrictions.GroupSubjectAtMostOneTeacherPerTimeslot_: Prevents multiple teachers from being assigned to the same subject, group, and hour.
restrictions.GroupSubjectHoursMustBeConsecutive: Group subject hours must be consecutive
restrictions.GroupSubjectHoursMustBeConsecutive_desc: Only applies to subjects with 'Consecutive hours' enabled. If a subject has multiple hours on the same day, they must form a single contiguous block.
restrictions.GroupSubjectHoursMustNotBeConsecutive: Group subject hours must NOT be consecutive
restrictions.GroupSubjectHoursMustNotBeConsecutive_de: Only applies to subjects with 'Consecutive hours' disabled. If a subject has multiple hours on the same day, no two hours may be adjacent (they must be separated by at least one gap).
restrictions.LinkedSubjectsConsecutive_desc: Linked subjects must be placed in adjacent (consecutive) hours when scheduled on the same day.
restrictions.SubjectGroupAssignment_desc: All subjects in a Subject Pack must be assigned to the same time slot.
restrictions.SubjectMustEveryDay: Subject must be taught every day
restrictions.SubjectMustEveryDay_desc: Subjects marked as 'teach every day' must have at least one hour each day.
restrictions.TutorMandatoryHours_desc: Rewards assigning the tutor to their group's first and last time slots of the week.
restrictions.TeacherPreferredTimes_desc: Rewards assigning teachers to their preferred time slots.
restrictions.TutorPreference_desc: Rewards tutors teaching in their own tutor group.
restrictions.TeacherAvoidGaps_desc: Penalizes gaps in teachers' daily schedules by encouraging all classes to be in a single contiguous block.
restrictions.JointClassAssignment_desc: Forces multiple lines of a course to share the same subject, teacher, and time slot.
restrictions.TeacherOneSubjectPerGroup_desc: Ensures each subject in a group is taught by at most one teacher.
